title: Companion Guide: NSSP ED Data on Respiratory Illness | National Syndromic Surveillance Program (NSSP) | CDC
text:
ndromic Surveillance Program (NSSP) 
To improve public health, NSSP helps gather and provide syndromic data from collaborations with state and local health departments and others.
